_comment: WIN-ACT-001 -- push buttons (filled, tonal, outlined, text). Composition-PINNING contract
over the three push-button variants that are actually compiled in definition.xml today, plus
an honest 'specified, blocked on new native source' carve-out for the two open gaps (outlined
variant, default-button emphasis). It pins nothing that a build-free session cannot prove from
source, and never promotes a target to an implemented claim.
Compiled reality (pinned fail-closed against definition.xml, read-only): the pushbutton/Entire
part carries exactly 13 <state> tuples -- tonal/plain (x5), filled extra="action" (x4), text
extra="flat" (x4, two of which are intentionally empty) -- and the shared 4-line pushbutton/
Focus ring (@primary, stroke-standard, inset 0.04-0.96) that every variant, including the
future outlined one, reuses. The <style> section deliberately pairs defaultActionButtonTextColor
== actionButtonTextColor (@on-primary) and defaultButtonTextColor == buttonTextColor
(@on-primary-container): that pairing is decision D-020's recorded deferral of distinct default
styling, so the checker pins it so the deferred state cannot drift toward OR away from distinct
default styling without a conscious edit.
TEMPORARY negative guard: extra="outlined" must NOT appear in the <pushbutton> block, and the
ControlType::Pushbutton branch of WidgetDefinitionPart::getStates (vcl/source/gdi/
WidgetDefinition.cxx) must still resolve sExtra only from mbIsAction / m_bFlatButton with no
'outlined' signal. Adding outlined XML states today would be unreachable dead markup, because
the native selector has no third field. This guard fails closed the instant someone adds
outlined XML without the matching native signal, and MUST be inverted the day the real signal
lands (see target.outlined.blocked_on).
It is source/composition evidence only: runtime_verified is false throughout -- no native build,
button pixels, or runtime interaction are claimed.
design_reference: docs/design/02-actions.md (1. Push buttons; 1.3 keyboard-default button D-020)

states.note: Text/flat idle draws no container: the <state> is intentionally empty.
Text/flat disabled draws no container: the <state> is intentionally empty.

default_pairs.note: D-020: filled default button looks identical to its action siblings.
D-020: tonal default button looks identical to its plain siblings.

gallery_cardinality.note: Cross-check against component-gallery-coverage.json so a partial/orphaned state addition is caught by a cardinality mismatch.

blocked_on: vcl/source/gdi/WidgetDefinition.cxx: add a new `sExtra = "outlined"` branch to the ControlType::Pushbutton case of WidgetDefinitionPart::getStates, gated on a new native signal.
vcl/inc/salgtype-adjacent PushButtonValue: add a new boolean member (e.g. m_bOutlineButton) alongside mbIsAction / m_bFlatButton.

vcl/source/window/builder.cxx: recognise a new style class in BuilderBase::handleStyle() (today's allow-list has context-*, priority-*, suggested-action, small-button, destructive-action, novertpad -- no 'outlined').
definition.xml: only then may the <pushbutton> block legitimately gain extra="outlined" states (transparent fill + @outline border at stroke-thin + @primary label, reusing the shared Focus part).
outlined.note: The outlined variant has no reachable native pushbutton state today; adding outlined XML now would be dead markup. Requires a real build across the above files, not text editing.

blocked_on: .codex/memory/decision-log.md D-020: every VclButtonBox member is already setAction(true), so a distinct default treatment would restyle the whole dialog button box; revisiting requires a real build and captures.

definition.xml <style>: distinct default styling would break the pinned defaultActionButtonTextColor==actionButtonTextColor and defaultButtonTextColor==buttonTextColor pairing, which is a conscious decision-log change, not a silent edit.
default_emphasis.note: Recorded design decision, not an open build-free task. The default button currently looks identical to its action/plain siblings; affordance is the platform focus/default border plus Enter activation.

native_branch.note: TEMPORARY: this guard proves the outlined native signal does not exist yet, so the definition.xml carve-out is honest. Invert (drop forbidden_token, add the outlined signal as required) the day target.outlined lands.

design_anchors: The outlined variant has no native
